note: EXAMPLE placeholder so `tsc` can resolve the import in CI / fresh checkouts. The real worker/src/targets.json holds the secret answer coordinates, is generated by scripts/generate-pieces.mjs, and is gitignored. To typecheck locally WITHOUT clobbering a real generated file, run (non-destructive): `test -f worker/src/targets.json || cp worker/src/targets.example.json worker/src/targets.json` — or just run the generator: `node scripts/generate-pieces.mjs`.
